whatsNew: Added Knowledge Refresh to Learning, creating personalised reteaching from incorrectly answered questions.
Knowledge Refresh uses Needs practice, Improving and Secure stages without changing original assessment results.
Incorrect responses from Revision, Functional Skills, CSCS, In-house Training, Trade Academy, EPA knowledge mocks and RPL refreshers are collected automatically.
Added short five-topic refresh sessions with explanations, newly worded checks and review history.
Added the ungraded RPL Refresher for every KSB recognised from previous learning.
Wrong RPL Refresher answers automatically become Knowledge Refresh topics.
Assignment RPL now also recognises its corresponding TA, PA and WT as RPL without creating false assessment records or PDFs.
Added correct-answer green glow, central tick, lime star burst and vibration feedback on revision and refresher questions.
Added wrong-answer shake, red cross, correct-answer highlight and vibration feedback.
Retained reduced-motion and non-colour feedback support.
